ogTitle: Hornsdale vs Hoskin Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hornsdale and Hoskin Corner.
heading: Hornsdale vs Hoskin Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hornsdale, South Australia and Hoskin Corner, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hornsdale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hoskin Corner (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hornsdale or Hoskin Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hornsdale has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Hoskin Corner scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hornsdale scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Hoskin Corner scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hornsdale or Hoskin Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hornsdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
